seoTitle: Parnaroo vs Parndana — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Parnaroo and Parndana. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Parnaroo and Parndana.
heading: Parnaroo vs Parndana — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Parnaroo, South Australia and Parndana, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Parndana has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Parnaroo (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Parnaroo or Parndana safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Parnaroo has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Parndana scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Parnaroo scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. Parndana scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Parnaroo or Parndana?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Parndana has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
